§6Gas Centrifuge§f

§aEssential machine for enriching uranium and plutonium hexafluoride into their useful isotopes!§f

§bGas Centrifuges§f process fluids like §bUranium Hexafluoride§f and §bPlutonium Hexafluoride§f to separate isotopes. Each operation has §e4§f probabilistic outputs — higher-weighted items are more common.

§6Crafting§f:
§b• 4×§f Centrifuge Element
§b• 8×§f Polymer Bar
§b• 2×§f Desh Ingot
§b• 8×§f Steel Plate
§b• 1×§f Military Grade Circuit Board

§b• Centrifuge Element§f requires: §b4×§f High-Speed Steel Plate + §b4×§f Titanium Plate + §b1×§f Motor (Assembly Factory)

§6UF6 Enrichment§f:
§b• Requires 2–4 centrifuges in cascade
§b• Last 2 need §bOverclocking§f upgrade
§b• §e8§f U-238 : §e1§f U-235 : §e1§f Fluorite per 10 ops (on average)
§b• Place all centrifuges before pumping fluid — recipe changes dump tanks!

§eTip§f: The Gas Centrifuge functions like a normal centrifuge but with probabilistic outputs. For UF6, the side facing away from you becomes the output. Place centrifuges in order from left to right!
